verses.sanskrit: वीक्षमाणस्ततो लङ्कां कपिः कृतमनोरथः ।वर्धमानसमुत्साहः कार्यशेषमचिन्तयत् ।। 5.54.1 ।।।।
verses.text:
Then, after fulfilling his heart's wish, Hanuma, looking over Lanka, thought about the 
remaining act to be done, with an augmented energy.

verses.sanskrit: किं नु खल्ववशिष्टं मे कर्तव्यमिह साम्प्रतम् ।यदेषां रक्षसां भूयः सन्तापजननं भवेत् ।। 5.54.2 ।।।।
verses.text:
"Which act indeed is remaing nowto be done by me here, that may further create anguish 
to these demons?"

verses.sanskrit: वनं तावत् प्रमथितं प्रकृष्टा राक्षसा हताः ।बलैकदेशः क्षपितः शेषं दुर्गविनाशनम् ।। 5.54.3 ।।।।
verses.text:
"I have demolished the garden. I have killed excellent demons. I destroyed a portion 
of the army. The demolition of the fort is still remaining."

verses.sanskrit: दुर्गे विनाशिते कर्म भवेत् सुखपरिश्रमम् ।अल्पयत्नेन कार्ये ऽस्मिन् मम स्यात् सफलः श्रमः ।। 5.54.4 ।।।।
verses.text:
"When the fort gets destroyed, the task (of Rama's battle) will be devoid of fatigue. 
Even with a small effort in this task, the work will become fruitful."

verses.sanskrit: यो ह्ययं मम लांगूले दीप्यते हव्यवाहनः ।अस्य सन्तर्पणं न्याय्यं कर्तुमेभिर्गृहोत्तमैः ।। 5.54.5 ।।।।
verses.text:
"It is justified to satisfy this blazing flame on my tail, by feeding it to the full, 
with these excellent houses (in the city of Lanka)."

verses.sanskrit: ततः प्रदीप्तलाङ्गूलः सविद्युदिव तोयदः ।भवनाग्रेषु लङ्काया विचचार महाकपिः ।। 5.54.6 ।।।।
verses.text:
Then, Hanuma, with his burning tail, strolled over the house-tops of Lanka, like a cloud 
charged with lightning.

verses.sanskrit: गृहाद् गृहं राक्षसानामुद्यानानि च वानरः ।वीक्षमाणो ह्यसन्त्रस्तः प्रासादांश्च चचार सः ।। 5.54.7 ।।।।
verses.text:
Surveying the gardens and lofty palatial mansions, that Hanuma, without fear, passed 
from one house to another, of the demons.

verses.sanskrit: अवप्लुत्य महावेगः प्रहस्तस्य निवेशनम् ।अग्निं तत्र स निक्षिप्य श्वसनेन समो बली ।। 5.54.8 ।।।।
verses.text:
Jumping down on Prahasta's house, the valiant Hanuma, with great swiftness, having strength 
equal to wind, scattering fire on it, jumped over from there, to another house belonging to Mahaparsva. 
Hanuma, with great swiftness, having strength equal to wind, scattering fire on it, jumped over from 
there, to another house belonging to Mahaparsva. Hanuma scattered a fire there resembling a flame of 
fire that is to destroy the world.

verses.sanskrit: ततो ऽन्यत् पुप्लुवे वेश्म महापार्श्वस्य वीर्यवान् ।मुमोच हनुमानग्निं कालानलशिखोपमम् ।। 5.54.9 ।।।।
वज्रदंष्ट्रस्य च तथा पुप्लुवे स महाकपिः ।शुकस्य च महातेजाः सारणस्य च धीमतः ।तथा चेन्द्रजितो वेश्म ददाह हरियूथपः ।। 5.54.10 ।।।।
verses.text:
That Hanuma, of great splendour, then leapt to the houses of Vajradamshtra, Shuka and 
Sarana, the intelligent.

verses.sanskrit: जम्बुमालेः सुमालेश्च ददाह भवनं ततः ।। 5.54.11
verses.text:
Leaving the house of Vibhishana, Hanuma of great splendour, went successively to the 
houses of Rashmiketu, Surya shatru, Hrasvakarna, Damshtra, Romasha the demon, Yuddhonmatta, Matta, Dhvajagreeva 
the demon, the terrific Vidyujjihva, Hastimukha, Karala, Pishacha, Shonitaaksha, Kumbhakarna, Makaraksha, 
Yajnashatru, Brahmashatru, Narantaka, Kumbha as also the evil-minded Nikumbha and burnt the houses.

verses.sanskrit: ।।्य च महातेजाः सारणस्य च धीमतः ।रश्मिमकेतोश्च भवनं सूर्यशत्रोस्तथैव च ।ह्रस्वकर्णस्य दंष्ट्रस्य रोमशस्य च रक्षसः ।। 5.54.12 ।।।।
युद्धोन्मत्तस्य मत्तस्य ध्वजग्रीवस्य रक्षसः ।विद्युज्जिह्वस्य घोरस्य तथा हस्तिमुखस्य च ।। 5.54.13 ।।।।
करालस्य पिशाचस्य शोणिताक्षस्य चैव हि ।कुम्भकर्णस्य भवनं मकराक्षस्य चैव हि ।। 5.54.14 ।।।।
यज्ञशत्रोश्च भवनं ब्रह्मशत्रोस्तथैव च ।नरान्तकस्य कुम्भस्य निकुम्भस्य दुरात्मनः ।। 5.54.15 ।।।।
वर्जयित्वा महातेजा विभीषणगृहं प्रति ।क्रममाणः क्रमेणैव ददाह हरिपुङ्गवः ।। 5.54.16 ।।।।
तेषु तेषु महार्हेषु भवनेषु महायशाः ।गृहेष्वृद्धिमतामृद्धिं ददाह स महाकपिः ।। 5.54.17 ।।।।
verses.text: That Hanuma of great fame burnt away wealth in the mansions of the rich.

verses.sanskrit: सर्वेषां समतिक्रम्य राक्षसेन्द्रस्य वीर्यवान् ।आससादाथ लक्ष्मीवान् रावणस्य निवेशनम् ।। 5.54.18 ।।।।
verses.text:
Having passed over all the houses, the mighty and glorious Hanuma thereafter approached 
the house of Ravana the king of demons.

verses.sanskrit: ततस्तस्मिन् गृहे मुख्ये नानारत्नविभूषिते ।मेरुमन्दरसङ्काशे सर्वमङ्गलशोभिते ।। 5.54.19 ।।।।
verses.text:
Thereafter, scattering a blazing fire located at the tip of his tail, on that principal 
house, decorated with various kinds of precious stones, resembling Mounts Meru and Mandara as also embellished 
with all good work, the valiant Hanuma roared like a cloud thundering at noon-time in a rainy season.

verses.sanskrit: प्रदीप्तमग्निमुत्सृज्य लाङ्गूलाग्रे प्रतिष्ठितम् ।ननाद हनुमान् वीरो युगान्तजलदो यथा ।। 5.54.20 ।।।।
श्वसनेन च संयोगादतिवेगो महाबलः ।कालाग्निरिव जज्वाल प्रावर्धत हुताशनः ।। 5.54.21 ।।।।
verses.text:
In contact with the wind, the fire escalated with a great speed and intensity, blazing 
like a fire that is to destroy the world.

verses.sanskrit: प्रदीप्तमग्निं पवनस्तेषु वेश्मस्वचारयत् ।अभूच्छ्वसनसंयोगादतिवेगो हुताशनः ।। 5.54.22 ।।।।
verses.text:
The wind carried the blazing fire to other houses. In conjunction with the wind, the 
fire became very swift.

verses.sanskrit: तानि काञ्चनजालानि मुक्तामणिमयानि च ।भवनान्यवशीर्यन्त रत्नवन्ति महान्ति च ।। 5.54.23 ।।।।
verses.text:
Those large houses, with golden windows, embedded with pearls, gems and precious jewels 
were shattered to pieces.

verses.sanskrit: तानि भग्नविमानानि निपेतुर्वसुधातले ।भवनानीव सिद्धानामम्बरात् पुण्यसंक्षये ।। 5.54.24 ।।।।
verses.text:
The demons, who were running hither and thither to protect their houses and who lost 
their spirits and abundant wealth, created a tumultuous nose, saying "Alas! The fire-god has come really 
in a form of this monkey!"

verses.sanskrit: संजज्ञे तुमुलः शब्दो राक्षसानां प्रधावताम् ।स्वगृहस्य परित्राणे भग्नोत्साहगतश्रियाम् ।नूनमेषो ऽग्निरायातः कपिरूपेण हा इति ।। 5.54.25 ।।।।
verses.text:
Some women crying and carrying their suckling's with their hair dishevelled, fell down 
from their houses, which were enveloped with fire, and shone like flashes of lightning falling from 
clouds in the sky.

verses.sanskrit: क्रन्दन्त्यः सहसा पेतुः स्तनन्दयधराः स्त्रियः ।काश्चिदग्निपरीतेभ्यो हर्म्येभ्यो मुक्तमूर्धजाः ।। 5.54.26 ।।।।
पतन्त्यो रेजिरे ऽभ्रेभ्यः सौदामिन्य इवाम्बरात् ।। 5.54.27 ।।।।
verses.text:
That Hanuma saw molten metals mixed with diamonds, corals, cat's eye-gems, pearls and 
silver, surging from every marvellous house.

verses.sanskrit: वज्रविद्रुमवैदूर्यमुकारजतसंहितान् ।विचित्रान् भवनान् धातून् स्यान्दमानान् ददर्श सः ।। 5.54.28 ।।।।
verses.text:
As the fire does not get satisfied with any amount of firewood and straw fed to it, Hanuma 
was not wearied in killing any number of demons. The earth was not then wearied in receiving the number 
of demons killed by Hanuma (in her lap).

verses.sanskrit: नाग्निस्तृप्यति काष्ठानां तृणानां हरियूथपः ।नाग्नेर्नापि विशस्तानां राक्षसानां वसुन्धरा ।। 5.54.29 ।।।।
verses.text:
Flames of fire glittered like Kimshuka flowers at some places, blossoms of Shalmali tree 
at some places and like saffron-flowers at some other places.

verses.sanskrit: क्वचित् किंशुकसङ्काशाः क्वचिच्छाल्मलिसन्निभाः ।क्वचित् कुङ्कुमसङ्काशाः शिखा वह्नेश्चकाशिरे ।। 5.54.30 ।।।।
verses.text:
The high souled Hanuma, the swift monkey scorched the city of Lanka, as Rudra scorched 
the city of Tripura.

verses.sanskrit: हनूमता वेगवता वानरेण महात्मना ।लङ्कापुरं प्रदग्धं तद्रुद्रेण त्रिपुरं यथा ।। 5.54.31 ।।।।
verses.text:
Then, the fire having a terrific prowess, diffused by the swift Hanuma, stretching out 
a circle of flames, blazed and rose up to the summit of the mountain on which the city of Lanka.

verses.sanskrit: ततस्तु लङ्कापुरपर्वताग्रे समुत्थितो भीमपराक्रमो ऽग्निः ।प्रमार्य चूडावलयं प्रदीप्तो हनूमता वेगवता विसृष्टः ।। 5.54.32 ।।।।
verses.text:
That fire diffused on those buildings, together with the wind picked up a speed equal 
to that of a fire at the time of dissolution of the world. It grew taller, touching the sky with a smokeless 
splendour. Those flames of fire shot up, as inflamed by ghee

verses.sanskrit: युगान्तकालानलतुल्यवेगः समारुतो ऽग्निर्ववृधे दिविस्पृक् ।विधूमरश्मिर्भवनेषु सक्तो रक्षश्शरीराज्य समर्पितार्चिः ।। 5.54.33 ।।।।
verses.text:
The great fire persisted, surrounding the entire Lanka, having a good splendour equal 
to that of millions of suns and blazed like a broken-up hemi-sphere of the world, creating many sounds 
of a wide-spread thunderbolt.

verses.sanskrit: आदित्यकोटीसदृशः सुतेजा लङ्कां समाप्तां परिवार्य तिष्ठन् ।शब्दैरनेकैरशनिप्ररूढैर्भिन्दन्निवाण्डं प्रबभौ महाग्निः ।। 5.54.34 ।।।।
verses.text:
The fire with a fierce splendour there, extended fully to the sky, shooting flames like 
Kumshuka flowers. The clouds, bearing the colour of blue lotuses, shone as covered by smoke formed out 
of the extinguished fire.

verses.sanskrit: तत्राम्बरादग्निरतिप्रवृद्धो रूक्षप्रभः किंशुकपुष्पचूडः ।निर्वाणधूमाकुलराजयश्च नीलोत्पलाभाः प्रचकाशिरे ऽभ्राः ।। 5.54.35 ।।।।
वज्री महेन्द्रस्त्रिदशेश्वरो वा साक्षाद्यमो वा वरुणो ऽनिलो वा ।रुद्रो ऽग्निरर्को धनदश्च सोमो न वानरो ऽयं स्वयमेव कालः ।। 5.54.36 ।।।।
किं ब्रह्मणः सर्वपितामहस्य सर्वस्य धातुश्चतुराननस्य ।इहागतोवाग्रूपधारीरक्षोपसंहारकरः प्रकोपः ।। 5.54.37
।किं वैष्णवं वा कपिरूपमेत्य रक्षोविनाशाय परं सुतेजः ।अनन्तमव्यक्तमचिन्त्यमेकं स्वमायया साम्प्रतमागतं वा ।। 5.54.38 ।।।।
verses.text:
Thus spoke all those excellent troops of demons in multitude, gathering together there, 
on seeing that city scorched so soon, with its host of living beings, houses and trees.

verses.sanskrit: इत्येवमूचुर्बहवो विशिष्टा रक्षोगणास्तत्र समेत्य सर्वे ।सप्राणिसङ्घां सगृहां सवृक्षां दग्धां पुरीं तां सहसा समीक्ष्य ।। 5.54.39 ।।।।
verses.text:
Then, Lanka having been scorched with its demons, horses, chariots, elephants, multitude 
of birds, animals and trees, cried pitiably with tumultuous noise.

verses.sanskrit: ततस्तु लङ्का सहसा प्रदग्धा सराक्षसा साश्वरथा सनागा ।सपक्षिसङ्घा समृगा सवृक्षा रुरोद दीना तुमुलं सशब्दम् ।। 5.54.40 ।।।।
verses.text:
Making a very terrific noise with a dreadful sound, the demons cried in various ways 
as follows: "O my dear beloved son! O my beloved husband! O my friend! O my very auspicious life, filled 
with enjoyments!"

verses.sanskrit: हा तात हा पुत्रक कान्त मित्र हा जीवितं भोगयुतं सुपुण्यम् ।रक्षोभिरेवं बहुधा ब्रुवद्भिः शब्दः कृतो घोरतरः सुभीमः ।। 5.54.41 ।।।।
verses.text:
That Lanka appeared as though afflicted by a curse, as defeated by a strong fury of Hanuma, 
enveloped by flames of fire, with its distinguished heroes killed and with its warriors in retreat.

verses.sanskrit: हुताशनज्वालसमावृता सा हतप्रवीरा परिवृत्तयोधा ।हनूमतः क्रोधबलाभिभूता बभूव शापोपहतेव लङ्का ।। 5.54.42 ।।।।
verses.text:
Hanuma, with his great mind, saw Lanka with its dazed, frightened and dejected demons, 
marked by blazing flames of fire and afflicted by the fury of Brahma the creator of the universe.

verses.sanskrit: स सम्भ्रमत्रस्तविषण्णराक्षसां समुज्ज्वलज्ज्वालहुताशनाङ्किताम् ।ददर्श लङ्कां हनुमान् महामनाः स्वयम्भुकोपोपहतामिवावनिम् ।। 5.54.43 ।।।।
verses.text:
After demolishing the garden which was full of excellent trees, killing great demons 
in battle and burning that city endowed with a series of excellent houses, Hanuma the monkey and the 
son of wind-god, stood at ease.

verses.sanskrit: भङ्क्त्वा वनं पादपरत्नसङ्कुलं हत्वा तु रक्षांसि महान्ति संयुगे ।दग्ध्वा पुरीं तां गृहरत्नमालिनीं तस्थौ हनूमान् पवनात्मजः कपिः ।। 5.54.44 ।।।।
verses.text:
Standing there on the wonderful flat summit of Mount Trikuta, Hanuma the foremost leader 
of the monkeys, having a garland of flames formed by his blazing tail, shone like the sun having a garland 
of rays.

verses.sanskrit: त्रिकूटशृङ्गाग्रतले विचित्रे प्रतिष्ठितो वानरराजसिंहः ।प्रदीप्तलाङ्गूलकृतार्चिमाली व्यराजतादित्य इवांशुमाली ।। 5.54.45 ।।।।
verses.text:
Killing those multitudes of demons, demolishing that garden endowed with several trees 
and scattering fire on the houses of demons, the high-souled Hanuma sought Rama with his mind.

verses.sanskrit: स राक्षसांस्तान् सुबहूंश्च हत्वा वनं च भङ्क्त्वा बहुपादपं तत् ।विसृज्य रक्षोभवनेषु चाग्निं जगाम रामं मनसा महात्मा ।। 5.54.46 ।।।।
verses.text:
Then, all the multitude of celestials enlogised that Hanuma, the principal warrior of 
the monkeys, possessing great strength and swiftness similar to the wind, greatly intelligent and the 
most excellent.

verses.sanskrit: ततस्तु तं वानरवीरमुख्यं महाबलं मारुततुल्यवेगम् ।महामतिं वायुसुतं वरिष्ठं प्रतुष्टुवुर्देवगणाश्च सर्वे ।। 5.54.47 ।।।।
verses.text:
Demolishing the garden, killing the demons in battle, Hanuma of great splendour shone 
brightly, after burning the beautiful City of Lanka.

verses.sanskrit: भङ्क्त्वा वनं महातेजा हत्वा रक्षांसि संयुगे ।दग्ध्वा लङ्कापुरीं रम्यां रराज स महाकपिः ।। 5.54.48 ।।।।
verses.text:
Seeing that city of Lanka burnt there, celestials, saints and great sages along with 
celestial's musicians, got a colossal surprise.

verses.sanskrit: तत्र देवाः सगन्धर्वाः सिद्धाश्च परमर्षयः ।दृष्ट्वा प्रदग्धां तां विस्मयं परमं गताः ।। 5.54.49 ।।।।
verses.text:
Seeing that Hanuma, the foremost among the monkeys and a mighty monkey, all the created 
beings were frightened, thinking of him as a fire that is to destroy the world.

verses.sanskrit: तं दृष्ट्वा वानरश्रेष्ठं हनुमन्तं महाकपिम् ।कालाग्निरिति सञ्चिन्त्य सर्वभूतानि तत्रसुः ।। 5.54.50 ।।।।
verses.text:
There, all the celestial musicians, Vidyadharas the supernatural beings, Nagas the celestial 
serpents, Yakshas the spirits and all great living beings attained a great joy.

verses.sanskrit: देवाश्च सर्वे मुनिपुङ्गवाश्च गन्धर्वविद्याधरनागयक्षाः ।भूतानि सर्वाणि महान्ति तत्र जग्मुः परां प्रीतिमतुल्यरूपाम् ।। 5.54.51 ।।
